title: DSN parse error doesn't say which character triggered it
body: ParseDSN returns errInvalidDSNUnescaped when a password contains an unescaped '@', but the error message is generic and doesn't point at the offending character or its position in the DSN string, making generated DSNs hard to debug.

title: interpolateParams + unsafe collation error lacks guidance
body: Setting interpolateParams=true together with certain collations returns errInvalidDSNUnsafeCollation, but there's no documentation on which collations are considered unsafe or how to adjust the DSN to fix it.

title: Dropped connection during Commit isn't reported as ErrBadConn
body: When conncheck detects the connection was closed by the server during a transaction Commit, connection.go returns the raw network error instead of driver.ErrBadConn, so database/sql doesn't know it's safe to retry on a fresh connection.

title: Document when caching_sha2_password full auth is skipped
body: auth.go implements the caching_sha2_password full authentication (RSA key exchange) path, but it isn't documented anywhere why this is skipped once TLS is active versus requiring ServerPubKey on plaintext connections.

title: Large result sets allocate a fresh buffer per row
body: Row-reading code path in packets.go allocates new byte slices instead of reusing the connection's shared buffer, causing noticeable GC pressure when streaming very large result sets.
